case_title: SPG CENTER, LLC VS. MACY'S WEST, INC.,

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITY; DECLARATION OF HARVEY FRIEDMAN IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED BY PETITIONER SPG CENTER, LLC AS TO RESPONDENT MACY'S WEST, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION WAVING RIGHTS OF APPEAL FILED BY MACY'S WEST, INC.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-19-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER SPG CENTER, LLC HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-2005 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SPG CENTER, LLC, MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT-NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER SPG CENTER, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACY'S WEST, INC. $330,180.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $330,180.00, SEE SCANNED DOC. PLUS 1/2% PERCENTAGE RENT (OVER A NATURAL BREAKPOINT). THE PARTIES SHALL BEAR THERE OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COST.
